title: USPTO Trademark Case
description: JSON Schema for a USPTO trademark case record from the TSDR API.

registrationNumber.description: Trademark registration number (null if not registered)

trademarkStatusDate.description: Date of most recent status change

markLiteralElements.description: Text elements of the trademark mark

filingDate.description: Date the trademark application was filed

registrationDate.description: Date the trademark was registered (null if not registered)

ownerAddress.description: Mailing address of the trademark owner

goodsAndServices.description: Description of goods and services covered by the mark
